"vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:L/AC:L/PR:L/UI:R/S:U/C:H/I:H/A:H"}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-863", "name": "Incorrect Authorization"}], "description": "## Summary

Allow-always persistence could trust wrapper carrier executables instead of the actual invoked target when commands were routed through dispatch wrappers.

## Impact

A one-time approval could persist a broader future allowlist entry than the operator intended, weakening execution approval boundaries.

## Affected Component

`src/infra/exec-approvals-allowlist.ts`

## Fixed Versions

- Affected: `<= 2026.3.24`
- Patched: `>= 2026.3.28`
- Latest stable `2026.3.28` contains the fix.

## Fix

Fixed by commit `9ec44fad39` (`Exec approvals: reject wrapper carrier allow-always targets`).", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00124, "percentile": 0.02504}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-p4x4-2r7f-wjxg", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-04-01T00:02:20Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-p4x4-2r7f-wjxg", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-p4x4-2r7f-wjxg"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-41380"}], "nvd_published_at": null, "published_at": "2026-04-01T00:02:20Z", "references": ["https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/security/advisories/GHSA-p4x4-2r7f-wjxg", "https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/commit/9ec44fad390f0bc1c29c3cc418b322560cb0222b", "https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/releases/tag/v2026.3.28", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-p4x4-2r7f-wjxg"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/openclaw/openclaw/security-advisories/GHSA-p4x4-2r7f-wjxg", "severity": "high", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw", "summary": "OpenClaw gateway exec allow-always over-trusts positional carrier executables", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-04-28T18:16:16Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-p4x4-2r7f-wjxg", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "2026.3.28", "package": {"ecosystem": "npm", "name": "openclaw"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "<= 2026.3.24"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: OpenClaw gateway exec allow-always over-trusts positional carrier executables
